title: The Crew Moves Toward the Fight
description: On pages 13–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the crew moves toward the fight.
scene: The scene follows the crew moves toward the fight, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Jinbe, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ten years have passed since that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fukaboshi, Ryuboshi and mamboshi... the three princes have never wavered in their efforts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the king and princess, too, have continued to address the kingdom over the monitors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as a result, the people of this kingdom have once again submitted a great number of signatures in support of their cause....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the battle against discrimination that has plagued our island for sixteen long years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: is also the tale of the fish-man pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Arlong, the man responsible for tormenting the people of your Homeland...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was once my own comrade in arms....!! I feel responsible for his actions!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always intended to seek him out and stop him if he ever went too far...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But through his bribes to the local officials...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ....Arlong ensured that word of his misdeeds never reached as far as marine HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Right, that does it!! Cut your stomach open!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't think that'll be enough for us to forgive you, but it'll at least help nami- San feel a little better!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stop, Sanji- KUN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He never meant for anything like that to happen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But, Nami- San...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will submit to whatever punishment you see fit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! It's along that I hate, not you.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: I'm just glad that the rumours about you being the Mastermind behind Arlong's crew weren't true.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: After all, you're Luffy's friend, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not going to deny that the things along and his crew put me through were terrible...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's thanks to that suffering that I was able to find such wonderful friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're talking about me, right, Nami- Saaaan-?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no point resenting my past now; it's a part of who I am. That's why I'm not going to hate you just for being a fish-man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So please, don't start apologising for what happened to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've had some good times as well, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm happy with how things have turned out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...nyluuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...such kind words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Words that I have done nothing to deserve...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You have my eternal gratitude ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Uwooohhh!! I feel your pain, big guy!! jimbel, you're a real man!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: that tiger, too... and Otohime!! I love all you fishy guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, shut your face, frankly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He must have been suffering terribly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And as for you...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How long are you gonna stay asleep?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: BUE !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, right ..!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So yeah, jimbe!! What happened to the thief that crybaby's mum captured?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you sleep through the whole damn story?!!! That was right back at the beginning!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So your name's Shirahoshii, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you really friends with the sea kings ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: N... nami-chin!! Chopper-chin!! That's the princess you are talking to!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Yes... AHH....!! I must apologise ....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All these memories of my mother are bringing tears to my eyes....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It sounds like she was an incredible woman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...she was!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's strange, nami-chin- same... even though this is the first time we've met...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I feel as though we're friends already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh...! your Highness, "Nami-Chin" is just a nick- name -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Really?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess it could be because we grew up in similar circuit-stances ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now then, I apologise for the distraction... let us return to the matter at hand.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allow me to confirm exactly who is present in the Royal Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with his majesty and a number of soldiers as prisoners... and four of your companions are still unaccounted for.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HORDY AND HIS CREW ARE CURRENTLY OCCUPYING THE PALACE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Papping

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: USOPP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: brook

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eptune and his soldiers

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's as much as we can say at the present stage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nyuuu... jimbei-san ...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If Hody's scheme is proceeding as planned in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then something even more terrible must be happening across the island right now....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HACHI... of course! You have been spending time in the fish-man district...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know of the details of HORDY'S plan...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I always suspected that he was up to no good during the years he spent there after leaving the army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he made sure never to let me uncover what he was planning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes... I know what he's planning...

summary: The Crew Moves Toward the Fight. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
